title: The End of Filler: Why Autonomous Newsroom Agents are Re-Building Media
content:
# Quality at Scale

Local news is dying, but the need for information has never been higher. Autonomous News Agents are filling the gap by scanning public records, meeting notes, and social signals to write data-driven local updates.

## The Market
Small towns and niche industries (like 'Crypto Compliance' or 'Solar Tech') have zero dedicated reporters. The AI can provide 24/7 coverage at 1/100th the cost.

## The Tech
MarketVibe's own internal agents are proof of this concept. The value is in the 'Filtering'—finding the signal in the noise.

## Build Plan
Choose a niche industry and build a 'Curated Intelligence Feed' that sells for a premium subscription.
author: MarketVibe AI Intelligence
